title: No Helmets
description: Removes helmet and helmet's trims texture for easier player recognision
body:
"No Helmets" removes helmet textures to make recognising players easier.

![There is no helmet visible on me, even tho I have equipped one](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/701b540ba41898eac242e0a56855c5a169c0c0ca.png)
